job_description:
# Data Quality & Integration Analyst
Company: Arcadia
Source: Official company posting via Lever
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://jobs.lever.co/arcadia/52f2bb51-16a2-4f30-87a5-a88e3460a758

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare data quality and integration role supporting population health analytics.
- Emphasizes advanced SQL, healthcare data ingestion, integration, and data quality ownership.
- Mentions large-scale record preparation, analysis, and cross-functional collaboration with implementation and engineering teams.
- Basic Python is helpful, but the strongest overlap is SQL, healthcare data quality, and integration workflows.
strengths: Strong overlap with healthcare data quality, reconciliation, and validation work.
Advanced SQL and cross-functional delivery map directly to current payer ETL analyst experience.
Remote US role in a healthcare analytics company.
gaps: Posting references Python familiarity; resume supports only upskilling/basic exposure.
Role is integration-heavy and may involve customer implementation context beyond current resume emphasis.
notes: Strong fit for healthcare data quality and integration. Keep tailoring focused on SQL, source-to-target validation, reconciliation, data quality routines, and stakeholder collaboration. Do not overstate Python beyond current upskilling/basic familiarity.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Quality & Integration Analyst | SQL | ETL Validation | Payer Data

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and improving trusted enterprise data across healthcare environments. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for integration-focused roles that require healthcare data analysis, issue resolution, and cross-functional partnership with engineering and implementation stakeholders.

replacements.find: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage
replacements.replace: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage, integration validation

replacements.find: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—adopted across the QA team to standardize testing and reduce ramp time for new analysts.
replacements.replace: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—to standardize data quality validation across healthcare ETL workflows.
